CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, ts DateTime, value String);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (2, '2019-01-01 01:02:03', 'another sample value');
SELECT dumpColumnStructure(CAST(ts AS DateTime)) FROM test_table;
SELECT dumpColumnStructure(CAST(value AS String)) FROM test_table;
SELECT id, dumpColumnStructure(CAST(ts AS DateTime)) FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT dumpColumnStructure(nested_value) FROM (SELECT CAST(value AS String) AS nested_value FROM test_table WHERE id = 1);
CREATE TABLE temp_table (id Int32, name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT dumpColumnStructure(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM temp_table WHERE name = 'Alice'));
SELECT dumpColumnStructure(CAST(ARRAY[1, 2, 3] AS Array(Int32))) AS array_structure;
WITH (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE id = 2) AS id_select SELECT dumpColumnStructure(CAST(id_select AS Int32));
SELECT dumpColumnStructure(CAST('2023-12-31' AS Date)) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table);
SELECT dumpColumnStructure(CAST(TODAY() AS Date)) AS today_structure;
